title: České Budějovice, South Bohemia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to České Budějovice, South Bohemia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

České Budějovice is a city in South Bohemia with a population of 94,000. The capital of South Bohemia, home to Budweiser Budvar brewery, a stunning main square, and a gateway to the Šumava region.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
